pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py line 51 confirms this is the target name for the task

Floreant POS official documentation (https://floreant.org/support/installation-backoffice/) states 'Our default password is admin: 1111'. Also confirmed in environment notes (line 6) and task_utils.sh (line 8: FLOREANT_PIN='1111'). This is the PIN required to access the Back Office from the main terminal screen.

Environment notes (line 17) confirm 'DB: /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb/'. The metadata provides the parent directory path which is the correct installation location for the Derby server directory. Also confirmed as fallback in setup_task.sh line 18 and export_result.sh line 26.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b with a pre-populated Apache Derby database containing sample restaurant data. The default Back Office PIN is 1111. The database is located at /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/. The task requires renaming the default terminal to 'Front Counter' via the Back Office configuration menu.
